prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年约第 63–75 名（2026 年第 75 名），属全国中上游水平；近年声誉平稳，未见明显负面舆情或投档断档记录；抖音热度数据中该校未进入前 106 名，短视频曝光量一般，报考关注度处于中等水平；第五轮学科评估数据中该校未收录，无法直接引用；该校以地质学、地质资源与地质工程为传统优势，相关 学科在国内处于领先地位。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化等专业社会热度持续高热推荐，对高分考生有较强吸引力；地质类、材料类 等传统工科热度偏低，呈明显劝退趋势。本省 2026 年物理类考生约 206500 人，较 2025 年增长约 19.7%，竞争加剧；学校位于北京市，对陕西考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在陕西招生占比约 1.4%–1.8%，属跨省招生正常比例。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 20686 名、2026 年大幅扩招约 20.7% 对位次的后移作用，以及本省物理类考生增长约 19.7% 带来的竞争加剧，两者基本抵消但扩招略占主导；同时计算机/电子等热门专业持续高热，对高分考生吸引力强。预测 2026 年最低位次约 23059 名，区间 22559–23559 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science/physics category were approximately 59590→20596→19493→15628→20686. In 2021, due to that year, from 2022 onwards it returned to normal range; in the recent 3 years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 19493–20686, with the 2025 baseline around 20686th place; the provincial science/physics category enrollment plan was 79 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 82 in 2024, and maintained at 82 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 99 students, an increase of about 20.7% compared to 2025, with a significant increase in enrollment quotas, which has a backward effect on rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its main ranking on the Soft Science ranking has been around 63rd–75th in recent years (75th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally; its reputation has been stable in recent years, with no obvious negative public opinion or records of admission gaps; in Douyin heat data, this university did not enter the top 106, with general short video exposure, and the level of application attention is moderate; the data from the fifth round of discipline evaluation has not been included for this university, so it cannot be directly cited; the university has traditional advantages in geology and geological resources and geological engineering, with related disciplines leading domestically.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as computer science, electronic information/communication, electrical engineering and automation continue to be highly popular, strongly attracting high-scoring students; traditional engineering majors like geology and materials have low popularity, showing a clear trend of being discouraged. In 2026, the number of physics category examinees in this province is about 206,500, an increase of about 19.7% compared to 2025, intensifying competition; the university is located in Beijing, which has a strong regional appeal to Shaanxi examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8%, which is a normal proportion for cross-provincial enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of 20686th place, the backward effect on rankings from the significant enrollment expansion of about 20.7% in 2026, and the intensified competition from the increase of about 19.7% in provincial physics category examinees, the two roughly offset each other but the expansion slightly dominates; at the same time, popular majors like computer science/electronics continue to be highly popular, strongly attracting high-scoring students. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 23059th place, with a range of 22559–23559th place.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for liberal arts/history category was approximately 2534→2412→2387→2434→2490. Over the past 5 years, the ranking fluctuated narrowly between 2387 and 2534, remaining stable around 2400. The baseline for 2025 is about 2490. The provincial liberal arts/history category enrollment plan was 4 students from 2021 to 2024, increased to 9 in 2025, and further to 16 in 2026, a significant expansion of about 77.8% compared to 2025, which will notably push the ranking backward.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its main ranking on the Soft Science Ranking has been around 63rd to 75th in recent years (75th in 2026), placing it at the upper-middle level nationally. Its reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion or record of enrollment gaps. On Douyin heat data, this university did not enter the top 106, indicating moderate application attention. The fifth round of discipline evaluation data for this university is not included, so it cannot be directly cited. The university's traditional strengths are geology and geological resources and engineering, while liberal arts majors are not its strong suit.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Located in Beijing, the university has strong regional appeal for Shaanxi candidates. Its enrollment proportion in Shaanxi is about 1.4%–1.8%, a normal cross-provincial enrollment ratio. Law has high but polarized social heat, accounting shows differentiation and wait-and-see, while English/translation has average heat. In 2026, the number of history category candidates in the province is about 88,500, an increase of about 17.0% compared to 2025, intensifying competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 2490, the significant expansion of about 77.8% in 2026 which will notably push the ranking backward, and the increase of about 17.0% in provincial history category candidates intensifying competition, the expansion rate far exceeds the candidate growth rate, so overall competition is significantly weakened. The predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 3602, with a range of 3102–4102.
